'''''Pizzazz'' 8''' is the eighth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[May]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''. The issue also features an ad and order form to join the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Official Star Wars Fan Club]].<ref name="Issue 8" />
